parameters.query:
SELECT channel, scheduled_at 
FROM t_content_generation.linkedin_posts 
WHERE channel IN ('individual', 'databiz')
  AND is_scheduled = TRUE 
  AND scheduled_at > NOW() 
ORDER BY scheduled_at ASC;

SELECT id, channel, created_at 
FROM t_content_generation.linkedin_posts 
WHERE channel IN ('individual', 'databiz')
  AND status = 'approved' 
  AND is_approved = TRUE 
  AND is_scheduled = FALSE 
ORDER BY id ASC;

UPDATE t_content_generation.linkedin_posts
SET is_scheduled = TRUE,
    scheduled_at = '{{ $json.scheduled_at }}',
    timezone = '{{ $json.timezone }}',
    status = 'scheduled',
    updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = {{ $json.id }};
